news.title: Asia-Pacific markets pare gains as oil rebounds on Iran war-linked uncertainty
news.summary: Asia-Pacific markets rose but pared earlier gains as oil prices rebounded, underscoring lingering uncertainty over the trajectory of the Middle East conflict.

news.title: India’s private sector growth slows to over 3-year low in March, weighed down by Mideast conflict
news.summary: India's private-sector business activity, which had been on an upswing since the start of 2026, falters in March due to shockwaves from the Iran war

news.title: ‘Tax resistance’ gains attention amid ICE protests, Iran war — and IRS penalties could follow
news.summary: Tax protesters often withhold taxes due to moral objections to certain government programs, such as the Iran war. But there can be IRS penalties, experts say.

news.title: Jim Cramer says Monday’s market rally may be short-lived
news.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer cautioned investors that Monday's stock market rebound, sparked by optimism over a potential end to the U.S.-Iran war, might be temporary.

news.title: Iran attacks in Strait of Hormuz are ‘economic terrorism against every nation,’ UAE oil CEO says
news.summary: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must re-open to resolve the supply shock.

news.title: Chevron CEO says Iran war impact isn't fully priced into oil market, traders have ‘scant information’
news.summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth said the physical supply of oil is much tighter than the oil futures market suggests.

news.title: Andrew Ross Sorkin on worrying similarities between Wall Street today and 1929's pre-crash market - CBS News
news.summary: Andrew Ross Sorkin on worrying similarities between Wall Street today and 1929's pre-crash market  CBS News
